description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Fuzz CI that runs on every pull request to the dev branch and on a scheduled cron job every Sunday at midnight. The workflow should have read permission to repository contents and use a concurrency strategy that cancels in-progress jobs. Use an ubuntu-latest job matrix to run fuzzing with address, undefined, and memory sanitizers. For each sanitizer, build fuzzers for the pcapplusplus project, run the fuzzers for 600 seconds, and upload artifacts on failure if the build was successful.
